items.title: Krishna painting Radha

items.cardline: Sunlight through leaves, golden notes fall

items.title: 'Between the barking dogs and a painted - tiger I sleep'
items.title_zh: “在吠叫的狗和画中的老虎之间我入睡”

items.cardline: Nostalgia flows warm, quiet on painted canvas

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 波斯细密画中，藏着帝国的梦与诗
items.cardline: Persian miniature dreams, empire's poetry in detail

items.title: Raja Viram Dev
items.cardline_zh: 王者之姿，在岁月长河中依然巍峨
items.cardline: Raja's majesty, still towering through time's river

items.title: Copy of painting inside the caves of Ajanta (Cave 1)
items.title_zh: 阿旃陀石窟（第1窟）壁画摹本
items.cardline_zh: 洞穴里的光，被油彩捕获并永恒照亮
items.cardline: Cave light captured, eternally bright in oil

items.title: Two Indian ladies, one with a drum, the other with a sarangi.
items.title_zh: 两位印度女士，一位持鼓，另一位持萨朗吉琴
items.cardline_zh: 鼓点与琴音，在静止的画中依旧回响
items.cardline: Drum and sarangi still echo in frozen frame

items.title: Shiva and Parvati
items.cardline_zh: 神与神女的静谧，如雪山般纯净永恒
items.cardline: Shiva's stillness, pure as eternal snow

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 无名之作，却藏着万千未完的诗篇
items.cardline: Nameless work holds myriad unfinished poems

items.title: A burn in flood
items.cardline_zh: 火焰吻过水面，留下灰烬的纹路。
items.cardline: Where fire kisses water, ash patterns remain.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 无名之手，绘出时光的沉默。
items.cardline: Nameless hand paints the silence of time.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 细笔游走，花鸟在宣纸上苏醒。
items.cardline: Fine brush strokes wake flowers and birds on silk.

items.title: Akbar and Hamid Bakari
items.title_zh: 阿克巴与哈米德·巴卡里
items.cardline_zh: 君王侧目，英雄低语。
items.cardline: King turns his gaze, heroes whisper.

items.title: Radha and Krishna
items.cardline_zh: 爱在笛声中缠绕，永恒的一瞬。
items.cardline: Love twines in flute song, eternal moment.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 暮色中的花园，无人知晓的私语。
items.cardline: Garden at dusk, whispers known to none.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 宫廷深处，锦缎藏着密语。
items.cardline: Deep in court, brocade hides secret words.

items.title: Charles II Giving Audience at Christ's Hospital
items.title_zh: 查理二世在基督医院接见
items.cardline_zh: 王座前，众生俯首如潮。
items.cardline: Before the throne, bowing waves of court.

items.title: Plant and Curtain
items.cardline_zh: 叶影婆娑，帘幕轻垂。
items.cardline: Leaves dance in shadow, curtain hangs still.

items.title: Shiva
items.cardline_zh: 三目观世，恒河从发间流淌。
items.cardline: Three eyes see all, Ganga flows from hair.

items.title: Krishna and Balarama
items.cardline_zh: 兄弟并肩，牧笛声碎星辰。
items.cardline: Brothers side by side, flute shatters stars.

items.title: Wherwell
items.cardline_zh: 田野沉睡，树影在风中低吟。
items.cardline: Fields asleep, tree shadows hum in wind.

items.title: Copy of painting inside the caves of Ajanta (Cave 1)
items.title_zh: 阿旃陀石窟（第1窟）壁画摹本
items.cardline_zh: 千佛凝视，壁画剥落成叹息。
items.cardline: Thousand Buddhas gaze, murals flake in sighs.

items.title: Khan-i Kilan
items.cardline_zh: 权柄与谦卑，同在一幅画卷。
items.cardline: Power and humility live in one frame.

items.title: Upton Grey
items.cardline_zh: 村舍炊烟，融化于灰色天际。
items.cardline: Cottage smoke melts into grey horizon.

items.title: Salim spearing a lioness
items.cardline_zh: 利矛刺入，草原的寂静破裂。
items.cardline: Spear thrust breaks the silence of the plains.

items.title: Copy of painting inside the caves of Ajanta (cave 2)
items.title_zh: 阿旃陀石窟（第2窟）壁画摹本
items.cardline_zh: 莲花在手，佛陀的微笑永恒。
items.cardline: Lotus in hand, Buddha's smile eternal.

items.title: Copy of painting inside the Ajanta caves
items.cardline_zh: 石壁上的莲花，千年未谢。
items.cardline: Lotus on stone wall, never fading for ages.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 墨色流淌，山峦在纸上呼吸。
items.cardline: Ink flows, mountains breathe on paper.

items.title: Goda Raga
items.cardline_zh: 弦音未起，孔雀已开屏等待。
items.cardline: Before the note, peacock fans its tail.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 一抹永恒之蓝，凝固了时光。
items.cardline: An eternal blue, frozen in time.

items.title: Copy of painting inside the caves of Ajanta (cave 17)
items.title_zh: 阿旃陀石窟（第17窟）壁画摹本
items.cardline_zh: 岩壁上的佛国，笔尖复现的梵音。
items.cardline: Buddha's realm on rock, ink revives ancient chants.

items.title: Balbhadra, Subhadra and Jagannatha
items.title_zh: 大力罗摩、须跋陀罗与贾格纳特
items.cardline_zh: 三圣并立，神性的凝视穿透画布。
items.cardline: Three gods stand, divine gaze pierces the canvas.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 无名之画，自有其语。
items.cardline: A nameless painting speaks its own tongue.

items.title: One of eleven paintings of occupations
items.cardline_zh: 劳作之手，编织生活之诗。
items.cardline: Hands at work weave the poem of life.

items.title: Vishnu and Lakshmi
items.cardline_zh: 爱神相拥，宇宙在此静止。
items.cardline: Gods embrace, the universe stands still.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 抽象之域，色彩独自低语。
items.cardline: Abstract realm, colors whisper alone.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 古意盎然，墨迹里藏着旧梦。
items.cardline: Ancient air, ink hides old dreams.

items.title: Copy of painting inside the caves of Ajanta (Cave 1)
items.title_zh: 阿旃陀石窟（第1窟）壁画摹本
items.cardline_zh: 石窟幽光，经千年而犹在。
items.cardline: Cave's dim light, enduring millennia.

items.title: Copy of painting inside the Ajanta caves (cave 17)
items.title_zh: 阿旃陀石窟（第17窟）壁画摹本
items.cardline_zh: 壁画残影，莲花座上诸天静默。
items.cardline: Fresco shadows, deities silent on lotus thrones.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 半掩容颜，神秘如月下莲花。
items.cardline: Half-veiled face, mysterious as moonlit lotus.

items.title: Copy of painting inside the caves of Ajanta (cave 17)
items.title_zh: 阿旃陀石窟（第17窟）壁画摹本
items.cardline_zh: 笔端复刻，千年梵唱再响。
items.cardline: Brush replicates, ancient hymns resound.

items.title: Boeing 707
items.cardline_zh: 钢铁巨鸟，划破二十世纪的天空。
items.cardline: Steel bird tears through the 20th-century sky.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 水波荡漾，梦境在色彩里浮现。
items.cardline: Ripples dance, dreams emerge in color.

items.title: Radha and Krishna
items.cardline_zh: 爱侣低语，永恒在刹那定格。
items.cardline: Lovers whisper, eternity caught in a moment.

items.title: Copy of painting inside the caves of Ajanta (cave 2)
items.title_zh: 阿旃陀石窟（第2窟）壁画摹本
items.cardline_zh: 石壁花开，佛国净土在笔下重生。
items.cardline: Stone blooms, Buddha's pure land reborn in paint.

items.title: Copy of painting inside the caves of Ajanta (cave 2)
items.title_zh: 阿旃陀石窟（第2窟）壁画摹本
items.cardline_zh: 第二洞天，壁画里的另一个世界。
items.cardline: Second cave, another world within the fresco.

items.title: One of eleven paintings of occupations
items.cardline_zh: 匠人精神，于细微处见真章。
items.cardline: Artisan spirit, truth in every detail.

items.title: One of eleven paintings of occupations
items.cardline_zh: 平凡一日，被画笔永久珍藏。
items.cardline: An ordinary day, treasured forever by brush.

items.title: Krishna and Balarama
items.cardline_zh: 兄弟同行，神性在人间漫步。
items.cardline: Brothers walk, divinity strolls on earth.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 时光在沉默中凝固，色彩低语着未说的故事。
items.cardline: Time freezes in silence, colors whisper untold stories.

items.title: Applying Paint
items.cardline_zh: 画笔轻触，灵魂在色彩中苏醒。
items.cardline: Brush touches, soul awakens in color.

items.title: Maharaja Ram Singh
items.cardline_zh: 王座上的寂静，比千言万语更沉重。
items.cardline: Silence on the throne, heavier than a thousand words.

items.title: Bala Krishna
items.cardline_zh: 稚子之舞，宇宙在掌中旋转。
items.cardline: Infant dance, the universe spins in his palm.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 无题之诗，笔触即是言语。
items.cardline: Untitled poem, each stroke a word.

items.title: Maharana Amar Singh of Mewar
items.title_zh: 梅瓦尔的阿马尔·辛格王公
items.cardline_zh: 华服之下，威严如群山静立。
items.cardline: Beneath finery, majesty stands like silent mountains.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 褪色的记忆，在光影间徘徊。
items.cardline: Faded memories linger between light and shadow.

items.title: Bindubasini
items.cardline_zh: 神秘之眼，凝视着永恒的深渊。
items.cardline: Mystic eyes gaze into the eternal abyss.

items.title: Kali
items.cardline_zh: 黑暗中的舞者，毁灭与创造同体。
items.cardline: Dancer in dark, destruction and creation unite.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 千年墨色，诉说着无名的传奇。
items.cardline: Millennium ink tells nameless legends.

items.title: Copy of painting inside the caves of Ajanta (Cave 1)
items.title_zh: 阿旃陀石窟（第1窟）壁画摹本
items.cardline_zh: 古窟遗韵，色彩穿越时光低吟。
items.cardline: Ancient cave echoes, colors hum through time.

items.title: Madhavchandra Giri
items.cardline_zh: 修行者静坐，空境中万籁俱寂。
items.cardline: Sage sits in stillness, all sounds cease in void.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 无题之境，观者自见心象。
items.cardline: Untitled realm, each viewer sees their own mind.

items.title: Copy of painting in the caves of Ajanta (cave 1)
items.title_zh: 阿旃陀石窟（第1窟）壁画摹本
items.cardline_zh: 笔下佛陀，微笑穿越千年尘世。
items.cardline: Painted Buddha smiles through a thousand dusts.

items.title: Sāraṃga rāgiṇī
items.cardline_zh: 弦音未起，画中已有天籁。
items.cardline: Strings still, yet celestial music fills the frame.

items.title: Chandra
items.cardline_zh: 冷月清辉，照亮暗夜中的秘密。
items.cardline: Cold moonlight reveals secrets of the dark.

items.title: Kurma
items.cardline_zh: 龟甲之上，托起苍茫天地。
items.cardline: On tortoise shell, the vast world is borne.

items.title: Matsya
items.cardline_zh: 鱼跃沧海，初始之神游于无垠。
items.cardline: Fish leaps ocean, primal god swims in the infinite.

items.title: Pavana
items.cardline_zh: 风神轻呼，万物随之摇曳。
items.cardline: Wind god sighs, all things sway in response.

items.title: Gaur and Nitai
items.cardline_zh: 圣者同行，爱如莲花绽放心间。
items.cardline: Saints walk together, love blooms like lotus in heart.

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 暮色中一抹孤蓝，空寂如风
items.cardline: A lone blue in twilight, silent as wind

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 淡墨晕染，时光静默无言
items.cardline: Ink washes time into silent stillness

items.title: Indra
items.cardline_zh: 神王低眉，雷霆藏于袖间
items.cardline: God-king's eyes down, thunder in sleeve

items.title: Kalki
items.cardline_zh: 白马踏焰，末世的曙光
items.cardline: White horse on flames, dawn of the end

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 花影摇动，一瞬即永恒
items.cardline: Flower shadows sway, a moment eternal

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 鸢尾低垂，羽翼轻敛秋光
items.cardline: Iris droops, wings fold autumn light

items.title: Shorashi
items.cardline_zh: 女战神剑指，乌云裂开
items.cardline: Goddess points sword, storm clouds part

items.title: Vamana
items.cardline_zh: 三步行遍三界，泥土生莲
items.cardline: Three strides cross worlds, mud blooms lotus

items.title: Balarama and Revati
items.cardline_zh: 他与她，如藤与树共生
items.cardline: He and she, vine and tree entwined

items.title: Copy of painting from the caves of Ajanta (cave 1)
items.title_zh: 阿旃陀石窟（第1窟）壁画摹本
items.cardline_zh: 石窟残影，莲花依旧盛放
items.cardline: Cave shadows, lotus still in bloom

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 青绿山水间，一舟独往
items.cardline: Blue-green hills, a lone boat sails

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 暗夜中，一朵白花低语
items.cardline: In dark night, a white flower whispers

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 远山如黛，近水含烟
items.cardline: Distant hills like brows, water veiled in mist

items.title: Narasimha
items.cardline_zh: 狮吼震碎黄昏，血染残阳
items.cardline: Lion roar shatters dusk, blood dyes sun

items.title: Untitled
items.cardline_zh: 枯枝新芽，轮回悄然而至
items.cardline: Dead branch, new bud, cycle steals in

items.title: Rama
items.cardline_zh: 王子执弓，眼神如秋水
items.cardline: Prince with bow, eyes like autumn water

items.title: Akbar
items.cardline_zh: 君王侧耳，风中有诗篇
items.cardline: Emperor listens, wind carries verses

items.title: Jagannatha, Balabhadra and Subhadra
items.title_zh: 贾甘纳特、巴拉巴德拉与苏巴德拉
items.cardline_zh: 三神并立，人间烟火袅袅
items.cardline: Three gods stand, mortal smoke rises

items.title: Karttikeya
items.cardline_zh: 孔雀羽翎，神光如电
items.cardline: Peacock plumes, divine light like lightning

items.title: Saraswati
items.cardline_zh: 琴弦未动，智慧已生花
items.cardline: Strings untouched, wisdom blooms in air
